verses.text: All offerings must be brought to the tabernacle door. One place. Worship is centred where God appoints.
All offerings must be brought to the tabernacle door. One place. Worship is centred where God appoints.
All offerings must be brought to the tabernacle door. One place. Worship is centred where God appoints.
All offerings must be brought to the tabernacle door. One place. Worship is centred where God appoints.
They must not sacrifice to devils in the open field. No devils. Idolatry is forbidden.
They must not sacrifice to devils in the open field. No devils. Idolatry is forbidden.
They must not sacrifice to devils in the open field. No devils. Idolatry is forbidden.
Whoever offers elsewhere is cut off. Cut off. Disobedience in worship is grave.
Whoever offers elsewhere is cut off. Cut off. Disobedience in worship is grave.
Eat no blood, 'for the life of the flesh is in the blood.' No blood. Life and atonement belong to God.
Eat no blood, 'for the life of the flesh is in the blood.' No blood. Life and atonement belong to God.
Eat no blood, 'for the life of the flesh is in the blood.' No blood. Life and atonement belong to God.
Blood of hunted beasts is poured out and covered. Poured out. Blood is treated as sacred.
Blood of hunted beasts is poured out and covered. Poured out. Blood is treated as sacred.
He that eats carrion washes and is unclean. Carrion. Cleansing is required.
He that eats carrion washes and is unclean. Carrion. Cleansing is required.
